member.name: T:Wtns.Me.Cli.Wtns
member.summary: The CLI class (cli, Cli) reprents a base-level implmentation of the WTNS library accessible from a simple console/terminal/shell. The CLI itself has the sole purpose of hooking into the WTNS library and contains minimal meaningful code. This class and by extension the project serve as an example of the features within the WTNS library.
